lines.english: The four watches of the day are like the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਮਨਿ ਆਸ ਘਨੇਰੀ ਕੋਈ ਐਸਾ ਸੰਤੁ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਪਿਰਹਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: darasan kee man aas ghaneree koee aisaa sant mo kau pireh milaavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind's desire for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is so great. Is there any Saint who can lead me to meet my Beloved? ||1||Pause||
The five demons have joined together, to separate me from my Husband Lord.
Wandering and rambling, I cry out and wring my hands. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਭਈ ਤਬ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rain bhee tab ant na jaane |2|
lines.english: And when night comes, I think that it shall never end. ||2||
realizing his own self, he has obtained supreme peace. ||4||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau har daras dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord has revealed the Blessed Vision of His Darshan to servant Nanak;
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
In the Lord's service, are the greatest treasures.
Serving the Lord, the Ambrosial Naam comes into one's mouth. ||1||
The Lord is my Companion; He is with me, as my Help and Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਓਟ ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: har meree ott mai har kaa taan |
lines.english: The Lord is my Support; the Lord is my Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਿਮਰੀ ਤਹ ਮਉਜੂਦੁ ਜਮੁ ਬਪੁਰਾ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਕਹਾ ਡਰਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh simaree teh maujood jam bapuraa mo kau kahaa ddaraaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In pain and pleasure, whenever I remember Him, He is present. How can the poor Messenger of Death frighten me now? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਖਾ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har meraa sakhaa man maeh deebaan |2|
lines.english: The Lord is my Friend; He is my mind's advisor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਵੇਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: har meree poonjee meraa har vesaahu |
lines.english: The Lord is my capital; the Lord is my credit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧਨੁ ਖਟੀ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਾਹੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh dhan khattee har meraa saahu |3|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I earn the wealth, with the Lord as my Banker. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਇਹ ਮਤਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te ih mat aavai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, this wisdom has come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੪॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har kai ank samaavai |4|16|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has merged into the Being of the Lord. ||4||16||
Serving the True Guru, all rewards are obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹੋਇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਤ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh hoe kripaal ta ihu man laaee |
lines.english: When God shows His Mercy, then this mind is focused on Him.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭ ਸੁਖ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰਿ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਭਰਪੂਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa kaa daataa sabh sukh nidhaan amrit sar sad hee bharapooraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is the Giver of blessings, the treasure of all comforts; His Ambrosial Pool of Nectar is always overflowing. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਿਉ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਕਰਹਿਗਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਪੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: man kiau bairaag karahigaa satigur meraa pooraa |
lines.english: O my mind, why are you so sad? My True Guru is Perfect.
meets the Beloved Lord; the Divine Light is revealed to him. ||2||
One who enshrines His Lotus Feet within the heart,
The unstruck melody, the sound current of the Naad, vibrates and resounds. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur naanak tutthaa miliaa har raae |
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Guru is totally pleased, one meets the Lord, the King.
The five companions have met together to sing the songs of joy.
Then, the night of one's life passes in peace and natural ease. ||4||17||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
Showing His Mercy, the Lord has revealed Himself to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਲੈ ਜਲਿ ਨਹੀ ਡੂਬੈ ਸੰਗੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਤਹੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhaeh na jaalai jal nahee ddoobai sang chhodd kar katahu na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It cannot be burned by fire, and water cannot drown it; it does not forsake society, or go anywhere else. ||1||Pause||
Gather such a wealth of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny.
Meeting the True Guru, I have received the perfect wealth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਿਖੁਟਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tott na aavai nikhutt na jaae |
lines.english: It does not run short, and it does not run out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਘਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: so sach saahu jis ghar har dhan sanchaanaa |
lines.english: He is the true banker, who gathers the wealth of the Lord within his own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਧਨ ਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਵਰਸਾਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eis dhan te sabh jag varasaanaa |3|
lines.english: With this wealth, the whole world profits. ||3||
Eating and consuming it, the mind remains satisfied. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਤਿ ਵਾਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਗਹਣਾ ॥੪॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ant vaar naam gahanaa |4|18|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, at that very last moment, the Naam shall be your only decoration. ||4||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਪੁਰਬ ਲਿਖੇ ਕਾ ਲਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: tin har dhan paaeaa jis purab likhe kaa lahanaa |
lines.english: He alone receives the Lord's wealth, who is pre-ordained to receive it.
Just so, you must know this well, that whoever is born, shall die.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
and, whether it is ripe or unripe, He cuts it down. ||1||
Just like the farmer, He plants His crop,
The day shall certainly be followed by the night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਭਗਤੁ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਹੈ ਥੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: govind bhagat asathir hai theea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Only the devotee of the Lord of the Universe becomes stable and permanent. ||1||Pause||
In the love of Maya, the unfortunate ones remain in sleep.
And when the night passes, the morning shall again dawn. ||2||
By Guru's Grace, a rare few remain awake and aware. ||3||
